internal_thoughts:

parsed_output.justification: Justin claims to be the Minion and states he saw no werewolves, which Mike (claiming Seer) confirms. Mitchell claims to be the Robber and stole from James. This leaves Caitlynn as the most likely candidate for the Drunk role; if two werewolf cards were in the center, the Drunk has a 66% chance of swapping into a werewolf. The players collectively conclude that Caitlynn is the most probable werewolf based on this logic.
